questions.question: What will the temperature be tomorrow?
questions.answer:
For tomorrow (2026-03-28) in Lithuania: adjusted estimate -97.3°C (baseline 2.3°C). Climatological baseline for 2026-03-28: 2.3°C
Year-to-date (86 days observed): 2026 is running 43.1°C colder than the model expects.
Most recent 30-day window: 99.6°C colder than expected.
Bias-adjusted estimate for tomorrow: -97.3°C
Note: this is a climatological trend estimate, not a live weather forecast.
questions.interpretation: Baseline: 2.3°C | YTD bias: -43.1°C | Recent 30d bias: -99.6°C | Adjusted: -97.3°C

questions.question: Is Lithuania currently warmer or colder than normal?
questions.answer:
**Lithuania Heating Degree Days (Eurostat)**: Lithuania Heating Degree Days Full year 2024: 3225.2 HDD total, versus a 1991-2020 baseline of 3893.6 HDD (anomaly -668.5 HDD). A negative anomaly indicates lower heating demand than the historical average, consistent with a warmer-than-normal winter.

**weather_summary narrative 1**: Lithuania Weather Summary

**Climate model evaluation**: The climate model reports R2 0.7756, RMSE 4.1936, and MAE 3.2521 on held-out data. That indicates usable predictive skill for climate anomaly briefing rather than exact deterministic weather forecasting.
